posts.author: siva
posts.text: Add to basket button — Yeah, will do in coming days.

posts.author: meshridharan
posts.text: Add to basket button — Hey @siva anything being done to give option to add to basket multiple positions at once? Also enable selection from option chain for basket in order menu. Alternatively you can give option to save the quick basket itself to regular basket. But please take this up guys been waiting for so long. Also noticed that menu button appear on mouse hover in quick basket why same is not the case in regular basket/ATO basket it also has only 2 or 3 functions under menu and similar buttons? image 757×131 4.09 KB image 986×330 15.9 KB
